eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Elmore, ID; at 5:32 PM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 10:32 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THERE IS A LARGE AND GROWING BRUSH FIRE I 84 MP 83 EB ON THE SOUTH SIDE WATCH FOR FIRE, PREPARE SUPPLIES, AND EVACUATE IF NEEDEED
